mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_test_data ( transaction_text, amount, transaction_date, source_type, expected_category, expected_account_code, expected_description, expected_company_name, expected_keywords, test_category, business_type, region, difficulty_level, test_tags, processing_results, test_passed, test_score, test_notes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{transactionText}, #{amount}, #{transactionDate}, #{sourceType}, #{expectedCategory}, #{expectedAccountCode}, #{expectedDescription}, #{expectedCompanyName}, #{expectedKeywords, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{testCategory}, #{businessType}, #{region}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{testTags, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{processingResults, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler}, #{testPassed}, #{testScore}, #{testNotes}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction_test_data SET transaction_text = #{transactionText}, amount = #{amount}, transaction_date = #{transactionDate}, source_type = #{sourceType}, expected_category = #{expectedCategory}, expected_account_code = #{expectedAccountCode}, expected_description = #{expectedDescription}, expected_company_name = #{expectedCompanyName}, expected_keywords = #{expectedKeywords, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, test_category = #{testCategory}, business_type = #{businessType}, region = #{region}, difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel}, test_tags = #{testTags, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, processing_results = #{processingResults, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler}, test_passed = #{testPassed}, test_score = #{testScore}, test_notes = #{testNotes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM transaction_test_data WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM transaction_test_data WHERE transaction_text ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR expected_company_name ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR expected_description ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM transaction_test_data WHERE amount BETWEEN #{minAmount}::decimal AND #{maxAmount}::decimal ORDER BY amount ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction_test_data SET processing_results = #{processingResults, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler}, test_passed = #{testPassed}, test_score = #{testScore}::decimal, test_notes = #{testNotes}, last_tested_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM transaction_test_data WHERE test_score BETWEEN #{minScore}::decimal AND #{maxScore}::decimal ORDER BY test_score DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE source_type = 'BANK') as bank_transactions, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE source_type = 'CARD') as card_transactions, COUNT(DISTINCT test_category) as unique_categories, COUNT(DISTINCT business_type) as unique_business_types, COUNT(DISTINCT region) as unique_regions, MIN(amount) as min_amount, MAX(amount) as max_amount, ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) as avg_amount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE difficulty_level = 1) as easy_cases, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE difficulty_level = 2) as medium_cases, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE difficulty_level = 3) as hard_cases, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE difficulty_level = 4) as very_hard_cases, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as passed_tests, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as failed_tests, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed IS NOT NULL) as tested_count, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_test_score FROM transaction_test_data

SELECT source_type, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) as avg_amount, MIN(amount) as min_amount, MAX(amount) as max_amount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as passed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as failed_count, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_score FROM transaction_test_data GROUP BY source_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT test_category, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) as avg_amount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as passed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as failed_count, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_score FROM transaction_test_data GROUP BY test_category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT difficulty_level, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) as avg_amount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as passed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as failed_count, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_score FROM transaction_test_data GROUP BY difficulty_level ORDER BY difficulty_level ASC

SELECT region, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) as avg_amount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as passed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as failed_count, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_score FROM transaction_test_data GROUP BY region ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT business_type, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) as avg_amount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as passed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as failed_count, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as avg_score FROM transaction_test_data GROUP BY business_type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed IS NOT NULL) as total_tested, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) as total_passed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = false) as total_failed, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed = true) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_passed IS NOT NULL), 0), 2) as success_rate, ROUND(AVG(test_score)::numeric, 2) as overall_avg_score, MIN(test_score) as min_score, MAX(test_score) as max_score, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_score >= 0.9) as excellent_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_score >= 0.7 AND test_score < 0.9) as good_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_score >= 0.5 AND test_score < 0.7) as fair_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_score < 0.5) as poor_count FROM transaction_test_data WHERE test_passed IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE test_batch_execution SET passed_count = #{passedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, success_rate = #{successRate}::decimal, average_score = #{averageScore}::decimal, layer_0_hits = #{layer0Hits}, layer_1_hits = #{layer1Hits}, layer_2_hits = #{layer2Hits}, layer_3_hits = #{layer3Hits}, layer_performance = #{layerPerformance, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler}, error_patterns = #{errorPatterns, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO transaction_test_data ( transaction_text, amount, transaction_date, source_type, expected_category, expected_account_code, expected_description, expected_company_name, expected_keywords, test_category, business_type, region, difficulty_level, test_tags, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.transactionText}, #{item.amount}, #{item.transactionDate}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.expectedCategory}, #{item.expectedAccountCode}, #{item.expectedDescription}, #{item.expectedCompanyName}, #{item.expectedKeywords, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{item.testCategory}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.region}, #{item.difficultyLevel}, #{item.testTags, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.delete: TRUNCATE TABLE transaction_test_data RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE
